title: GET_UROUTER_DYN
text: GET_UROUTER_DYN Get dynamic information about the Uniface Router. operation GET_UROUTER_DYN params entity UROUTERD.UROUTMON : OUT endparams Parameters UROUTERD.UROUTMON—single occurrence of entity UROUTERD.UROUTMON containing dynamic information about the Uniface Router. Table 1. UROUTERD.UROUTMON entity Fieldname Packing Code Data Type Description pid I4 Numeric Uniface Router's process ID privileged B2 Boolean T if this monitor has a privileged connection, F if not state C2 String I =idle, B =busy, E =exiting maxclients I2 Numeric Maximum clients allowed maxservers I2 Numeric Maximum servers allowed maxmons I2 Numeric Maximum monitors allowed response I4 Numeric Ticks taken for this monitor to get this entity from the Uniface Router ioprint I4 Numeric Value of $ioprint of Uniface Router msgtoclients C256 String Message returned on unsuccessful connect Return Values If successful, $status is set to zero. Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The GET_UROUTER_DYN operation gets dynamic information about the Uniface Router. Was this topic helpful?
